creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 146005
shar archive with new port

Perl module for loading a configuration directory 
tree containing YAML, JSON, XML, Perl, INI 
or Config::General files

Tested on FreeBSD-10.0-amd64 (log attached) with:
poudriere testport -j 10-amd64 -o devel/p5-Config-Merge > p5-Config-Merge.log
